underlying_goal: Enable natural language AI agent control over all wallet and workflow operations, including wallet groups, transfers, and workflow creation
friction_detail: Frontend sent fields (template, type, order) that backend DTO rejected due to forbidNonWhitelisted validation, requiring a fix after deployment.
brief_summary: User wanted natural language agent control over wallets/workflows; Claude implemented new agent tools across 7+ files, but a DTO mismatch caused a post-deploy bug that was then fixed.
